item.title: Elekta, Inc.: Brand Name: Geneva Product Name: Brachytherapy Applicator Product Description: The device is intended for intracavitary brachytherapy for ca Recall
item.product: Brand Name: Geneva Product Name: Brachytherapy Applicator Product Description: The device is intended for intracavitary brachytherapy for ca
item.summary: Due to safety concerns regarding the detachment of the tip of the intrauterine tube (IU tube) that may remain within a patient. Product details: Brand Name: Geneva Product Name: Brachytherapy Applicator Product Description: The device is intended for intracavitary brachytherapy for cancer treatment of the cervix and the endometrium. Optional needles can be placed for interstitial therapy.
